message:
perf(fusion,index): switch hot-path maps and sets to ahash

Replace std HashMap/HashSet with ahash AHashMap/AHashSet in the
fusion blending (blend.rs), RRF merging (rrf.rs), and brute-force
search (search.rs) codepaths. These collections sit on the critical
ranking path where keys are short doc-id strings — ahash's faster
non-cryptographic hashing gives a measurable win without sacrificing
correctness.

Changes:
- crates/frankensearch-fusion/Cargo.toml — add ahash workspace dep
- crates/frankensearch-fusion/src/blend.rs — AHashMap for merged
  score map, AHashSet for Kendall-tau seen set
- crates/frankensearch-fusion/src/rrf.rs — AHashMap for RRF scratch
  hits map
- crates/frankensearch-index/Cargo.toml — add ahash workspace dep
- crates/frankensearch-index/src/search.rs — AHashSet import
  (usage follows in subsequent search helpers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
